news.t: Pacer ETFs Surpasses $25B Milestone in Assets Under Management
Pacer ETFs Celebrates Banner Year of Growth in 2022, Crosses $20B to Kickoff New Year

holdings.infoBox: ICOW is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are Prysmian stock at 2.95%, Equinor ASA at 2.75%, Suncor Energy at 2.44%, TotalEnergies SE at 2.35%, and Anheuser-Busch InBev at 2.35%.

overview.description: The Pacer Developed Markets International Cash Cows 100 ETF (ICOW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of 100 companies out of the FTSE Developed Ex-US Index selected and weighted by free cash flow. ICOW was launched on Jun 16, 2017 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Pacer Developed Markets International Cash Cows 100 Index

data.title: Pacer ETFs Surpasses $25B Milestone in Assets Under Management
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pacer ETFs Surpasses $25B Milestone in Assets Under Management.
